summary:
WARNINGS FOR PUBLIC FIGURES: Brandon shares visions concerning several media personalities, beginning with Candace Owens. He describes seeing her looking into a black magician's hat that turns into a hole, accompanied by an Alice in Wonderland rabbit, symbolizing conspiracy theories that will prove to be true. Brandon notes that Owens will face an assassination attempt because of the information she is investigating, but a major political door will open for her to become a prominent mouthpiece if she yields to God. Brandon also describes a vision of Alex Jones turning away from Owens' computer to focus on the nation, with Brandon predicting Jones will become a radical modern-day John the Baptist who will survive an unsuccessful assassination attempt. Tucker Carlson is also mentioned as being present in the background but remaining uninvolved in the conspiracies.

POLITICAL FORECASTS: Brandon details prophetic insights regarding American politics, specifically warning of a modern-day Watergate scenario surrounding JD Vance. He mentions Vance changing his stance toward the end of his term in 2028, referencing Harvard bricks, scandals, and historical figures like JFK, Marilyn Monroe, and Monica Lewinsky. Brandon also sees Donald Trump Jr. wanting to leave politics for business, alongside glimpses of other political figures like Marco Rubio and Ron DeSantis. Furthermore, Brandon warns of a new, highly charismatic political figure being groomed, possessing an antichrist spirit and excellent speaking abilities reminiscent of Barack Obama. Brandon highlights Donald Trump as a massive obstacle preventing certain global agendas from progressing.

GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS AND MILITARY CONFLICTS: Brandon recounts visions of international unrest, starting with a revolution in Venezuela where a Saddam Hussein-like leader is overthrown, leading to new freedoms and a focus on oil and BRICS. He foresees a significantly colder Cold War involving a nuclear briefcase, North Korea, Taiwan, and South Korea. Brandon sees Kim Jong Un participating in a major ground invasion backed by Vladimir Putin. Additional visions feature Australian ground troops waiting at attention with an itchy trigger finger, anticipating events involving Russia, Cuba, and Venezuela. Emmanuel Macron and the King of England are also briefly mentioned in the context of these European and global tensions.

RELIGIOUS INSTITUTIONS AND YOUTH REVIVAL: Brandon warns of a targeted attack by Muslims against a main Mormon base in Utah, urging prayer to prevent mass casualties. He also sees a major shaking and move of God coming to the Vatican and the Catholic Church, connected to events taking place in Rome and Paris around the time of the Olympics opening ceremony. Concurrently, Brandon describes a massive youth revival sweeping across coliseums in states like Tennessee, Oklahoma, and Texas, featuring worship leader Kari Jobe. This revival will reach high school and college students, bringing a Billy Graham-type anointing and spreading globally to places like Australia.

RETURN TO CORE FAMILY VALUES: Brandon describes a vision reminiscent of the 1920s and 1930s Great Depression era, showing a farmer in overalls sitting around a makeshift wooden table with his family. He emphasizes a spiritual drought and Dust Bowl currently afflicting the nation, stating that overcoming it requires a return to fundamental Christian values, family prayer, and gratitude. Brandon predicts an upcoming wave of abundance and blessings for those who maintain an attitude of gratitude, specifically mentioning a surge of Thanksgiving babies resulting in an abundant harvest of children by the summer of 2026.
rawData: [November 14, 2025]-[What The Lord showed me about Candace Owens - We Must pray for her]-[https://youtu.be/Bv_BgO_L8lk]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. Somebody said, 'Brandon, could you say, "Hey, good morning, Jesus"?' and I sure can. 'Hey, good morning, Jesus.' This video is going to be kind of different, but I'm going to go over some things and say exactly what I heard the Spirit of the Lord say. The Lord told me, 'I've called you to say the hard things—the things that most people won't say.' He said, 'You'll say it with boldness and it'll prove to be accurate in the days ahead.' We all can miss it; we're all just human, every single one of us. So I come on here to tell you what I feel the Lord has told me. Everything I said last night and the day before has been very heavy on me, so I'm going to go over what the Lord showed me last night. I'm not going to add to or take away from anything, and I'm not rehearsing it. I'm saying this because of how heavy it is. I didn't know Candace or her platform; I don't watch this lady. I didn't know what I was seeing into. I was relaying to you what the Lord was telling me. As I was praying this out last night, I had no idea what she stood for or what she says, but I know what the Lord is saying to me about her and what's about to happen with her, and warnings for her. It's hard; I'm just being real with you all. When the Lord speaks to me so boldly, people ask, 'Brandon, why didn't you see Charlie Kirk's assassination?' Now I know why: because of the details the Lord is showing me right now—things I will never publicly say and things I've already said. So, we're going to go over what the Lord showed me yesterday. I saw Candace Owens and a black top hat that looked like a magician's hat. There was a rabbit from Alice in Wonderland, and the magician's hat became a hole in the ground. I saw the rabbit from Alice in Wonderland pop up through the hat, and the Lord started to speak to me about conspiracy theories. I could see the black hole and the rabbit jumping into it. He said, 'What was a conspiracy will prove to be not a conspiracy at all.' I saw Candace Owens, and what seems to be a conspiracy will prove to be not a conspiracy at all. I don't like misquoting it, but I don't have my notes here. It was just flowing. I saw Candace Owens sitting at a computer with emails coming to her, and her eyes looked like dough eyes. They looked like Puss in Boots from the Shrek movie. The cat was manipulating, trying to get you to like them, and it made you feel sorry for it; the eyes got really big. But this is what the Lord showed me when I was praying into this: it's the black tunnel, the conspiracy. As she was looking into it, she was seeing something that was not a conspiracy at all. Her eyes became that black hole the rabbit was jumping through. She was looking at emails and things being presented to her while she was in the dark. Like when you're in a dark room looking at a bright screen, she was typing and her eyes got bigger and bigger as more information came from the screen. Her eyes became more enlightened. As she was doing this, I heard, 'Pray for her life, for what she's dipping into will cost her. Pray for her, for what is a conspiracy will prove to be not a conspiracy at all.' Her eyes got bigger. Then I saw Alex Jones come up. He was looking at her from a glance at her computer, but he didn't want to touch it. He was focused on the nation. Alex Jones turned his face from her because he didn't want to get into what she was talking about, even if he believed it. In this vision, he turned his face toward the nation and said, 'I have bigger things to take care of, for our nation is going down. We must stand for America'—a sense of patriotism. Behind them was Tucker Carlson, but he was way back and didn't even care to entertain it. As I was praying, the Lord said, 'I'm going to use her if she'll yield to me. Where she has been right now is nothing compared to where I want to take her if she will yield and give herself over to me completely.' I saw a massive door on a castle, a major opportunity that will come to her. He said, 'Everything she has, I have given to her. I've graced her to do it. But if she will humble herself, there's much more in store. There's a door of opportunity bigger than what she's doing on YouTube or in her podcast; it was something in politics.' He said, 'I will amplify her voice and she will become a household name on a bigger scale for something with politics.' The Lord said he was going to anoint her to be a mouthpiece in these end times. I thought it was interesting. My friend helps me so much. I tell her, 'You are such a friend.' When she comes on here, her presence helps me. I never knew I could love somebody as much as I love her. I pulled her out while she was working on the house and said, 'I can't do this without you. Please help me.' What I saw bothered me greatly. Right before that, the Lord told me there's a storm concerning Candace and we should pray for her, as she hadn't even entered the eye of the hurricane. I questioned it, thinking, 'God, could this be you?' I plead the blood; that's why I'm slow about it. If you go back and listen to the video, it sounds choppy because when you're delivering messages and seeing these things, I'm thinking, 'What more are you showing me?' I see the storm and the Lord said, 'Pray for her. She needs much prayer. Her children need much prayer.' And I thought, "What is a storm?" She just lost her husband. All these things. And the Lord keeps giving me more and more. I'm not a conspiracy theory guy—I'm not at all. I'm going to be real with y'all: I'm black and white. I don't like watching these things; I don't listen to anybody else. My son does. He tells me, "Dad, this is what's going on." It's like I talk to him—I call him my best friend—I mean, I don't know, I love him dearly; I say my spiritual mentor—don't always explain yourself. It's just the Holy Ghost. You're just a voicepiece for what the Spirit of the Lord is telling you to do. I'm not here to come on here and rehearse or do whatever, but I try to make things clear so you understand it. I don't want prophetic confusion. I don't want to be a person who brings static in the prophetic community. I want clarity, and I want to be authentic and humble. I'm telling you, I can't do this without the Holy Ghost. Everything I hear and everything I see, I believe I'm getting it from him. I believe it. I'm getting it from the Lord. Now, you may say, "Brendon, I don't believe you, and I don't believe you hear the Lord." Well, that's okay. That's your opinion. But I do, and I believe this with all my heart. I stand by what I believe; it's what the Lord says to me. I believe this. It's heavy, the things I saw, and you don't even know half of it. I would say the messages that I've given over the last two days, they all go together in some way. And that's all I will say. If you do your research, you'll know. But I'm not talking about this anymore unless the Holy Spirit tells me to. And so, I pray for Candace's safety. I pray for Alex Jones's safety. If they want to keep going down the rabbit hole and they keep studying these things out, I know what the Lord said: there is a plan for her life. And everybody said, "Well, she's Catholic. She's this." I never pit denominations against each other. I always make this a religion-friendly zone. Whether you're Catholic, you're Mormon, you're Church of Christ, whatever—I welcome everybody. Now, I believe what I believe, and I believe in the baptism of the Holy Ghost with speaking in tongues. I believe in healing. I believe in deliverance. I believe that Jesus Christ has set you free if you believe him. Now, if you don't believe that, that's on you. But I'm not here to sit here and beat somebody up and say, "Well, you're Catholic. You don't believe the way I believe." I love it that the Catholics are here. I love it that the Baptists are here. I love it that the Mormons come over here. You said, "What do you see about Mormons?" I said, "You're the Mormon church in Salt Lake City. All that was going on over there." They say I'm derogatory. No, I'm not. I'm trying to tell you that you're going to be targeted by the Muslims. That's what I'm trying to tell y'all. I saw them watching in your church—your synagogues or your churches, whatever y'all have—and they went in there and started shooting everybody. And that's what I was trying to say. You need to pray over the main Mormon base in Utah. I saw mass casualties coming, and the Lord said, "Pray over these areas." I just deliver what he tells me. So, I try when it comes to this—the things I saw about JD Vance and the wound, the infection, and whenever I called out what I said about this man. I don't mean any ill toward our vice president or the president. I pray for them more than anybody would ever know. I do. But I say what I heard the Spirit of the Lord say. And a modern-day Watergate would try to manifest concerning JD Vance and other things. And the Lord said, "Marilyn Monroe, Monica Lewinsky, remember JFK. Don't forget it." So, I see these things and they're heavy because I want the Republicans to win. That's just me. And if I can protect and pray and believe God because they have the same conservative values that I have—a lot of them—then by all means, let's get there. But I saw a man that changes in 2028. I saw a man that, after the time goes by, changed a little bit, then changed a little bit more. I saw Harvard written out, but he didn't go to Harvard—he went to Yale. But I saw Harvard, and I saw it was in bricks; every one of the bricks was lined out—they were like on a brick house, and they were all written in Harvard letters. Harvard... and I prayed into that. Oh God, help me. And I saw a man that was one way one time and another way another time. Later on, opinions change as the end of the term comes in 2028. It wasn't all buddy-buddy anymore. Things drastically changed toward the end of the term. I heard, "Impeach, impeach, impeach," but they didn't have the votes. I heard scandal. I saw a man with mega-wealth take his hand and say, "I was told to do these things. I didn't want to; I was asked to." And he was a rat. So, I pray over those things that the Lord shows me because he said, "This has not happened yet." He said, "This is the future. You must pray." I said, "Lord, what? Am I looking into something that already happened?" He said, "No. No. This could be... basically unless you pray as the body of Christ, why we come on this channel in the first place." If you don't pray, the enemy is trying to get his slithery snake self in there to try to bring this to pass to take this man down because he was the front runner. But I saw other names being thrown around, and this was Don Jr., who I didn't feel like he wanted it—in the vision I saw, I didn't feel like that's really what he wanted to do. He wanted to be a businessman. He was done with politics, but his name was being thrown out. And then the African-American man with the heavy face and chubby cheeks—do you see this man? There he is. He's happy. I saw this man in the vision. See, his cheeks are happy. And Marco Rubio and the governor, Ron DeSantis. But the Lord said, "You're too focused on them for a new voicepiece like Obama will try to rise in the days ahead. For one is being groomed." And I saw a satanic endowment on this person to speak with great speech that would draw you in like an Antichrist spirit. Antichrist spirit. The speech was very well done, like Obama's. Obama had a way with words. He's very educated in the way he talked. I even liked to listen to him talk; I'd be like, "Man, he has something to say." But do you understand what I'm talking about? How Obama had a way with words. But this person will have a way with words. I saw it. Charisma. Charisma. There you go. Thank you for the word. Diana has better words than me. So, we pray into these things. Like I said, I had no idea. But all I know is I want to tell that Candace lady: God has a hand on you if you allow him to. If you humble yourself and you allow the Lord to use you—you may say, "Well, I've already done that." No, you haven't. No, you haven't. I smell that by the prophetic. You have not—maybe partially in your mind you have—but you're not broken before him, and the Lord wants to use you, but you must be broken before him, and he will use you in a greater capacity than whatever your mind can comprehend. And I don't agree with your stance on Israel, if it's toward the government or whatever. But that's your opinion and you're entitled to it. But I'm telling you, God has a plan for your life that's bigger than what you realize. God has a major thing he wants to do with you. And the door that's going to open for you is bigger than anything I've seen for a lot of people. It is a massive wood door with beautiful carvings in it, and it's glowing, waiting for you. And so I see these things. If you keep digging down the rabbit hole and the conspiracy, that's on you, but I pray for your safety. Not threatening—I'm just praying for you because I saw an attempt on your life. And that's why the Lord said, "You must pray for her." Maybe you already know that; maybe you've already had these visions. I don't know. All I know is the Lord said, "Pray for her just like you pray for Alex Jones, because he will become a modern-day John the Baptist and he will be really radical in the days ahead, for an attempt will be on his life that will not be successful." I don't know if he'll ever know it or not, or if it will be like Trump's ear or whatever, but the Lord said he would become very radical. Pray over his family; pray over him. Now, regarding Tucker Carlson, the Lord has not spoken anything to me about this man. He just said that he was one of the ones in the background that would be a voice, but it wasn't like Candace and Alex, and it continues to be that way. The other part of the vision from last night was Venezuela. I saw Venezuela and I keep seeing he will be like a Saddam. Show that picture. I thought this was interesting. You see that? They look a lot like they could be brothers. I thought that was kind of interesting. But I saw freedom coming and a new government coming into Venezuela. It's like a proxy government coming in and the people of Venezuela having more freedom to be able to do what they want to do. The Lord showed me all these oil derricks and the Lord said it's not all about drugs—10%—but 90% is about the oil and BRICS. I saw a Gaddafi, I saw a Saddam-like man with this man in the days ahead becoming overthrown. Now, if it's his own government that does it, I don't know, or if it's the United States, I don't know. But I saw a major revolution, a shaking coming to this nation. We pray for them because ultimately, bottom line, this is what I want you to understand. When it comes to North Korea and China, I told you communism was trying to rise up in South Korea. I saw the red dragon coming out and going through North Korea to try to infiltrate South Korea so that it would not be a major light in the days ahead because it was a touchdown place for the revival to spread from. The enemy was trying to cause hardship in those areas because, ultimately, this is where we're at: Jesus Christ is coming. All this other stuff to me is just wasting time. It's all about Jesus coming to me. You must know that He's coming. Everything else is secondary, like finances. People ask, "Brandon, what about the money? What about this? What about that?" I'm all about revival. Let's get the job done and let's get out of here. Let's preach this gospel throughout the world as a witness unto Him and then the end will come. Everything else is second. All these other things the Lord has me praying over with you is because it's on His heart and I just keep flowing with Him. It's a river. It pulls. It's not what I would have picked in the natural. If I had known today, it would have been very hard for me to speak out what I said last night. I would have been like, "I know I talk." But that's why it's good to be ignorant, because I just flow even whenever it makes your flesh cringe. I said, "Don't tell me anymore today. I don't want to know anymore. I don't want to hear anything else." Oh my gosh. Dear God, Diana, what did I say? You all can read into whatever you want, but that's not my job. I don't add to or take away from anything. I've done my job. I hope I did it well. If you're watching, Candace, God bless you. We pray for you. We know that God has a mighty hand on you. I pray that you get this fire shut up in your bones, the Holy Ghost fire. I want you to be radical for Jesus. You say, "Well, I'm Catholic; I don't care about all that." I'm talking about being radical for Jesus—fire shut up in your bones, the Holy Ghost fire, talking in tongues, baptized, water walking, laying hands on the sick, seeing them recover, casting out devils—a Christian that the devil is afraid of when you wake up in the morning. He goes, "Oh God, she's awake again." That's what I'm looking for. Not saying, "Well, I go and talk to the priest." I don't care. "I do the rosary or whatever," all that stuff. No, I'm talking about you talking in tongues. You're a fire-breathing Christian and the devil goes, "Ah!" when you get up. That's what I'm talking about. That's the kind of Christian we are. I don't know about all that other stuff, talking to popes and all that; I don't believe in it. I don't stand for it. But we believe in salvation. We believe in laying hands and casting out devils. It's time to get radical for Jesus. If we don't get radical for Jesus, we're going to lose what we have. We must get on fire, for our King is coming. We must be the virgins with the lamps full of oil. There were ten of them: five had their lamps full and five didn't. Ladies and gentlemen, which one are you? Have you lost your saltiness? You must remain salty because it is the salt that brings men to thirst. It's time for you to put on the new things and put that new wine in new wineskins and stop trying to be the old person. He said He would rather you be hot or cold, but if you're lukewarm, He'll spew you out of His mouth. How hard is that? But yet, we have so many Christians that are lukewarm—limp-wristed and spineless. You don't have a backbone like a crowbar Christian. It's not always easy to stand on this side and tell you what I hear, but I'll be bold. And if it costs me my life, so be it. I believe that His angels will bear me up in their hands lest I dash my foot against a stone. I'll keep declaring it until He calls me home. Jesus is coming and you need to repent and turn from your wicked ways or you're going to burn in hell. You must know Him. If you don't know Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior, there's no other way to the Father except through Him. The Holy Spirit is our comforter, our friend, and our standby, and He prays with me all the time. That's what brings perfect prayers. We must have a relationship with the Holy Spirit and be His friend. I love how He talks about my friend Billy Burke. He always calls him, "My friend, my friend." The Lord says, "Pray for my friend today." And I say, "You want me to pray for your friend today?" He doesn't do that very often. It's alarming to me. He doesn't call very many people His friend like that. You say, "Well, I'm a friend of God," but does He call you friend? I'm not trying to judge you, but I know when He calls people His friend. He'll say, "Brandon, will you pray for my friend today?" Of course I will. Who? Billy. Okay. But He doesn't do that very often, does He? He'll say certain people by their name, but very rarely will He ever say, "Will you pray for my friend?" I thought, "What does it take for You to call my name to somebody and say, 'Will you pray for my friend Brandon?'" I'm challenged by it. I'm jealous of their relationship because I think, "Man, if He calls him friend to me privately, what does He call me to him?" "Am I your friend? I want to be your friend so bad." Not just a relationship of acquaintance, but intimacy with the Father. There are so many people that are just visitors when it comes to the relationship with the Lord. I tell Diana all the time—we talk about it—we must be friends with Him. Diana and I don't keep anything from each other; we talk about everything. I don't say this arrogantly, but I don't know many relationships like ours. We spend 24 hours a day, seven days a week with each other, and we very seldom bicker. We have our stuff we go through, but she's my friend. I thought about when the Lord calls us to Him, what does He say about you to others? I heard a preacher say before, "Man, that person has anger. He's full of evil." Evil has a presence. Lust has a presence. Anger has a presence. Child pedophiles have a presence. But when you get around somebody, what presence do you carry? How much do you carry? What are you full of? I thought about that a lot because I heard Billy Graham preach that. Billy, I was thinking, what does the Father say about you? Does He call you friend? You call Him friend: "Oh yeah, He's my friend." But does He call you friend? I want it so bad. It's not just the glory, but it's the anointing that breaks the yoke. You can have the glory filling the house, but I thought, "Where is the anointing that breaks the yoke?" It's a tool that helps set the captives free. It comes in stages and levels—ankle-deep, knee-deep, waist-deep, and over-the-head deep. There are levels of the glory and levels of the anointing, and it all comes by refining fire and dying to self. How much of you does He have? It's not so much how much you have of Him, but how much He has of you. I am wall-to-wall Holy Ghost, but does He have all of me? Am I crucified with Christ? Nevertheless, I, but Christ in me, the hope of glory. That's why I try to tell you all this other stuff, the Candace stuff. I feel like it's a big distraction today. It pulls me and it caused me peace because I'm like, "Oh man, what did I do?" And the Lord said, "You did me a favor today." I was cleaning out my freezer, getting the ice out, and I said, "Lord, what did I do? What did I say?" And He said, "You're helping me because I want Candace. I want more of Candace, for I have a plan for her." I said, "Okay, whatever I can do to help you, Father." It's such an honor that 5,100 of you are here tonight to pray for our nation and this beautiful Thanksgiving season where we give God thanks and praise for a free nation that's one nation under God. I'm not here to judge a man's heart like JD Vance; I pray that he gets even more radical for Jesus. I only relay what I believe I heard the Lord say—that He wants more of him. The whole Harvard thing was rooted in a mindset. Ivy League colleges will poison you. Regardless of if you graduated there and are standing on the right, the left is teaching you. That's why I really believe in ORU and colleges that have a biblical-based Christian school. Don't feed your kids to the wolves. It gets in you regardless of whether you think it does or not. It's a little leaven that ruins the whole lump. Remember, a little leaven ruins the whole lump. I just want to be on fire for Jesus, and that's why we're here tonight. So, with all that being said, who wants to go tubing? You want to pray with us for a little bit? I talked for 40 minutes—not too bad. I hope I cleared it up and made peace in your heart. I touched as much as I could. Father, I thank You for how good You've been to us. Even if we miss it, there's grace to cover it. We're all human; none of us are Jesus Christ. We are all striving to be just like the King. We all come short of the glory, but it's by His grace and mercy that we are set free. When you fall down, you pick yourself up, brush your knees off, and keep marching. Be humble and say, "Lord, tomorrow's a better day." It's so heavy on me to pray for Candace because the rabbit hole is very bad. There's much truth to the rabbit hole, but it has a snare. There are levels of what you should touch for the safety of your own family. I say what I feel I'm called to say. God help us all. Thank You, Lord, that we're healed and whole. I apply the blood of Jesus over Braden, Megan, Paisley, Diana, and I. We walk in abundance. Thank You, Lord, for Your healing and goodness. You said that nothing shall by any means hurt us. The angels will bear us up in their hands, and I believe for Your divine protection. Thank You that we're always in the right place at the right time, avoiding tragedy. Thank You for Your provision. You always take care of us. 2025, Lord, we thank You for Your goodness. And thank You for 2026—for the glimpses that You keep showing me. Yes, it's turbulent and alarming, but you can either focus on the light or focus on the dark. It's your choice. Father, we thank You for the light. We're not called to fear. We're called to pray. God is so good. We take this body right now in the name of Jesus and we thank you for what you did for us. He became sickness for you that you don't have. Galatians, Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law in the mighty name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Lord, thank you for the blood and we make much of the blood and we apply the blood of Jesus and we thank you, Father, for the mighty blood of Jesus. And we cover ourselves in the blood and we thank you, Father, that you've washed our sins away. They're gone. As far as the east is from the west, you've taken our sins from us. They're gone. I thank you, Father. No matter how bad we mess up in life, you're always an ever-present help in a time of need. And we take the blood right now in Jesus' name. Amen and amen. Are you okay? Yeah. I feel his presence really strongly. You're crying on me and I said I know you feel the presence. I feel it, too. I feel his presence strong. He's our friend. I say I want him to call me friend. Lord, you're beautiful. Your face is all I seek. And when your eyes are on this child, your grace abounds to me. Oh Lord, please light the fire that once burned bright and clear. Thank you, Father, for he is so good and his mercy endures forever. For the Lord, he is good and his mercy endures forever. If you don't stop crying, I'm going to have to start crying. I feel the presence of the Lord so much. I'm trying to track the waterworks, too, baby. It's so beautiful. Yeah. Oh, Lord, you're beautiful. Your face is all I seek. All we seek. Just another touch. Your presence makes me whole. Jesus. Oh Jesus, your presence makes me whole. Lord, if I could just sit with you a while, I need you to hold me moment by moment till forever passes by. If I could just sit with you a while, I need you to hold me moment by moment till forever passes by. Thank you, Father, for your blood. Moment by moment till forever passes by. I see it. I see the white t-shirts again. I see the youth rallying all around. College campuses are full of people. A major revival will take place in coliseums and basketball and football coliseums full of rallies of youth, college kids with worship events with Kari Jobe. I see her singing on this stage. You said, 'Why her?' I don't know. I see what I see. And she sings because she's one of my favorites. But a major revival is going to take place throughout this land with your college kids, your high school kids, and your middle school kids. A greatest revival will come upon this land. And God is going to touch your children. I'm talking—he's calling the youth. The devil attacks so hard to try to bring the youth down in this generation because it was a threat. He only touches the threat. If you're not a threat, he probably isn't messing with you. But from what I see, the Holy Ghost and fire is coming on your youth. And a major move of God is coming throughout the coliseums. And what's interesting again, it's like what I saw with our friend is with the youth and the singing in Tennessee, Oklahoma, and Texas. You're going to see revival with the youth. I keep seeing the glory on these kids and a major move of God we're about to see from sea to shining sea. It's not just about America.
